name: Chunky Potatoes with Cheese, Garlic and Pesto
recipeIngredient: 4 lbs russet potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
6 sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, drained and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place potatoes in a 18x12 inch rimmed baking sheet.
3. Mix cream, sun-dried tomatoes, shallots, garlic, pesto and white pepper in a large bowl until blended.
4. Pour the mixture over the potatoes, stirring gently to coat.
5. Sprinkle both cheeses over potato mixture.
6. Bake until potatoes are tender and cheese is golden brown on top, about 45 minutes.
7. Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
